cross_scene_arcs.title: Assumption of Command
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hicks takes charge during crises, making key decisions like nuking the site and organizing defenses for the stranded survivors.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: De facto leader of the survivor group.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether his leadership can ensure the group's survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Ripley
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hicks and Ripley develop mutual respect and trust, leading to a death pact and personal commitment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Personal bond with mutual protection agreement.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Hicks' severe injury and their escape prospects.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Engagement with Xenomorph Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hicks progresses from learning about aliens to fighting them, resulting in injury that incapacitates him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aware of the xenomorph threat from briefing.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Severely injured and comatose from acid burns.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing alien threat and his survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loss of Family
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Newt's family discovers an alien ship, but she witnesses an attack that leaves her orphaned and traumatized.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Child in a prospecting family, excited about discovery

cross_scene_arcs.title: Forming a Maternal Bond
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Newt moves from fear and distrust to trusting Ripley, who becomes a mother figure, providing protection and comfort.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Terrified and defensive child hiding from rescuers
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Safe and bonded with Ripley, expressing hope for rest
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Initially, abandonment fear; later resolved as they survive

cross_scene_arcs.title: Guiding Through Danger
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Newt uses her knowledge to warn about alien threats and guide the group through vents, but faces danger when cocooned.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stranded with group, aware of nocturnal alien activity
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cocooned in alien nest, in immediate danger
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Imminent threat from emerging alien creature

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Xenomorph Menace
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley progresses from warning skeptical authorities about the alien threat to actively planning defenses and engaging in direct combat to destroy the xenomorphs.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dismissed and frustrated by the inquiry board's skepticism.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In violent combat with the Alien Queen, defending Newt.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the battle and the fate of the colony remain uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protecting Newt
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley forms a maternal bond with Newt, leading her to comfort, protect, and risk her life to rescue the child from the alien-infested colony.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Newt is withdrawn and non-verbal after trauma.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Newt is rescued and Ripley is actively defending her against the Alien Queen.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Newt's safety is still at risk during the ongoing battle.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Challenging the Company
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley's conflicts escalate with the inquiry board, Van Leuwen, and Burke over their negligence and greed regarding the alien threat, culminating in direct confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Authorities dismiss her warnings about the xenomorphs.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ripley confronts Burke, accusing him of causing colonist deaths and vowing accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Burke will face justice or retaliate remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Aftermath of the Nostromo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley is discovered alive after 57 years in hypersleep, only to learn that her daughter Amanda has died, leaving her with grief and regret over lost time.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In hypersleep, unaware of the time passed and her daughter's fate.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Grieving silently and preparing for the upcoming hearing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Regret over broken promises and inability to make up for lost time with her daughter.
